description: Post-run reconciliation table invariants. These must hold in bank.batch_reconciliations after every successful pipeline run.
note: The reconcile job counts staged_transactions WHERE status='posted' — rejected records are structurally excluded from all counts and totals.

invariants.description: counts_match must be true after a clean run with no rejected records
invariants.guardsAgainst: A reconciliation regression that leaves counts_match=false after a clean run.

invariants.description: totals_match must be true after a clean run with no rejected records
invariants.guardsAgainst: A reconciliation regression that leaves totals_match=false after a clean run.

invariants.description: Rejected records must be excluded from staged_count and staged_total_cents
invariants.guardsAgainst: Rejected rows leaking into staged_count or staged_total_cents.

invariants.description: Each batch_id must have exactly one reconciliation row — no duplicates on retry
invariants.guardsAgainst: Duplicate reconciliation rows for the same batch after retry or rerun.

invariants.description: staged_count and posted_count must both be >= 0
invariants.guardsAgainst: Negative reconciliation counts caused by aggregation or data-corruption bugs.

invariants.description: posted_count must never exceed staged_count — cannot post more than were staged as posted
invariants.guardsAgainst: posted_count exceeding staged_count because reconciliation over-reported posted transactions.
